params.note: double-double (dps=32) halo+mp solve; cold-start reaches the strong-PR branch; ||F||<1e-20; skip-on-fail

deps_semantics.any: warm-start from any one converged neighbour (optional)

notes: All points cold-start independently (parallel) — the halo+mp solver reaches the PR branch from no-learning.
>=20 points per sweep line; points that miss the 1e-20 policy are skipped.
